source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for calm English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for healthcare-adjacent Japanese labels, measurements, and forms.
layout: Healing 8px grids, rosette grouping, fleshy leaf panels, sand-soft shadows, and practical product controls.

prompts.label: Transparent aloe rosette motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Aloe transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a dry garden aloe rosette botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact aloe rosette with fleshy blue-green lance leaves, translucent gel-like highlights, small rust-orange tips and fine edge teeth, warm sand-toned base shadows, and medicinal green inner leaves. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, healing succulent identity, no agave spear rosette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full low rosette from a three-quarter angle without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no large agave spear leaves, no cactus spines, no flower stalk, no pot, no desert landscape, no hand, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Aloe light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Aloe", derived from the visible dry garden aloe rosette cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible healing product system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Aloe, Aloe Rosette, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from blue-green fleshy leaves, translucent gel highlights, rust leaf tips, medicinal greens, dry garden sand, and warm soil depth. The board must read as aloe, not agave, cactus, eucalyptus, or generic healthcare teal.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, product navigation, health dashboard metric cards, forms, table filters, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, dry-garden-sand backgrounds, aloe-blue-green primary actions, gel-green secondary surfaces, rust-tip warnings, medicinal-green success, rosette panel grouping, subtle fleshy-leaf texture.
Constraints: no large agave spear silhouette, no cactus spines, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Aloe", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Aloe dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Aloe". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible dry garden aloe rosette cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Aloe, Aloe Rosette, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the aloe system language: aloe-shadow dark backgrounds, sand foreground text, aloe-blue-green active controls, gel-green surfaces, rust-tip highlights, medicinal-green success, fleshy-leaf texture, rosette grouping, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as aloe, not agave, cactus, eucalyptus, or generic healthcare teal.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, product navigation, health dashboard metric cards, forms, table filters, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: aloe-shadow and dry-soil surfaces, sand foreground, aloe-blue-green controls, gel-green accents, rust-tip warning highlights, medicinal-green success, subtle fleshy-leaf overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no large agave spear silhouette, no cactus spines, no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Aloe".
